prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科组（含物理类）最低位次分别为约793名→1120名→818名→2748名→1996名，整体呈波动后移趋势。2024年出现断档式下跌至2748名，2025年明显回 升至1996名，近两年波动幅度较大，2025年基准位次约1996名；该校在青海省理科组招生计划2021–2022年各21人，2023–2024年各20人，2025年缩减至19人；20 26年计划仍为19人，与2025年持平，未产生扩招或缩招效应。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 上海财经大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年位列第35名，属于全 国顶尖财经类院校，层次稳固；2026年声誉数据中该校未出现明显负面舆情事件；抖音热度总排名第99位，评价为"一般"，近年热度平稳；2021–2025年均无投 档断档或录取异常记录，报考心理预期稳定；第五轮学科评估中，工商管理、应用经济学获评A+，理论经济学获评A，统计学获评A-，共4个A-及以上学科，财经 学科实力全国顶尖。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 财经类专业整体社会热度近年有所降温，但上海财经大学作为"两财一贸"成员仍保持较高关注度；青海省2026年高考总人数约48000 人，较2025年（约47669人）略有增加，竞争小幅加剧；上海财经大学位于上海市，对青海考生具有较强地域吸引力；该 校在青海省招生规模较小（理科组19人），招生占比极低，地域偏好对位次影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1996名、招生计划持平、青海省考生总数略增及财经 类热度平稳等因素，预计2026年理科组最低录取位次在1996名基础上小幅后移。预测最低位次约2026名，区间1722–2330名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Science Group (including Physics Category) were approximately 793 → 1120 → 818 → 2748 → 1996, showing an overall fluctuating and declining trend. In 2024, there was a cliff-like drop to 2748, and in 2025, it rebounded significantly to 1996, with large fluctuations in the past two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 1996. The university's enrollment plan for the Science Group in Qinghai Province was 21 students each in 2021–2022, 20 students each in 2023–2024, and reduced to 19 students in 2025. The 2026 plan remains at 19 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction effect.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai University of Finance and Economics is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranked 35th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, making it a top national finance and economics institution with a solid standing. In 2026 reputation data, there were no significant negative public opinion incidents. Its Douyin popularity ranks 99th overall, rated as 'average', with stable popularity in recent years. From 2021 to 2025, there were no admission interruptions or abnormal records, indicating stable application expectations. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Business Administration and Applied Economics received A+, Theoretical Economics received A, and Statistics received A-, totaling four disciplines at A- or above, showcasing top national strength in finance and economics disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The overall social popularity of finance and economics majors has cooled in recent years, but Shanghai University of Finance and Economics, as a member of the 'Two Finance and One Trade' group, still maintains high attention. The total number of examinees in Qinghai Province for 2026 is approximately 48,000, a slight increase from 2025 (about 47,669), leading to a minor intensification of competition. Located in Shanghai, the university has strong regional appeal for Qinghai examinees. Its enrollment scale in Qinghai Province is small (19 students in the Science Group), with a very low enrollment proportion, so regional preference has limited impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 1996, unchanged enrollment plan, a slight increase in the total number of examinees in Qinghai Province, and stable popularity of finance and economics, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for the Science Group in 2026 will slightly decline from 1996. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2026, with a range of 1722–2330.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 1722–2330, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch goal, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. Rankings better than the lower limit (within 1722) can focus on aiming for flagship majors like Accounting and Finance; rankings near the upper limit (around 2330) should consider safely filling Tier 3 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Liberal Arts Group (including History Category) were approximately 77th, 91st, and 191st respectively, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 114 positions over the past 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 191st; the enrollment plan for this university in Qinghai Province's Liberal Arts Group was 1 person each in 2023 and 2024, expanding to 2 persons in 2025; the 2026 plan remains at 2 persons, unchanged from 2025.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Same as the Science Group, 211 Project, Double First-Class, ranked 35th in the 2026 Soft Science Ranking; same as the Science Group, stable reputation, average Douyin popularity, no abnormal application records; the Finance and Taxation category corresponds to Applied Economics A+, and the Business Administration category corresponds to Business Administration A+, both top-tier disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Stable popularity of finance and economics majors; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Qinghai Province college entrance examination is about 48,000, slightly higher than in 2025; same as the Science Group, Shanghai has a strong attraction for Qinghai candidates, but the enrollment number is very small (2 persons), and the ranking is greatly affected by individual high-scoring candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 191st, unchanged enrollment plan, slight increase in total candidates, and the continuous backward trend in rankings, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for the 2026 Liberal Arts Group will continue to shift slightly backward from 191st. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 206th, with a range of 156th to 256th.
